articles.title: The $292M crypto hack exposed DeFi's weak spots. Here’s what must change, insiders say
articles.description: As Wall Street moves onchain, the year's biggest crypto hack and DeFi crisis is forcing a rethink of risk, security and market structure, industry insiders told CoinDesk.

articles.title: Prediction markets are ditching the 'casino' label to become a regular part of how people track the news
articles.description: A new report from Bitget and Polymarket reveals that prediction markets are evolving into a $240 billion industry driven by retail users who are trading more frequently on everything from crypto to politics.

articles.title: Riot posts $167M in Q1 revenue as data center arm pulls in $33M in first quarter
articles.description: Riot Platforms reported $167.2 million in Q1 2026 revenue, with its new data center business contributing $33.2 million as Bitcoin mining income fell.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH to BitMine in third OTC deal
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation has now sold roughly $47 million worth of ETH to BitMine in a week, drawing fresh criticism over the pace and scale of its sales.

articles.title: Bitcoin above $78,000 as Senate clears Clarity Act yield hurdle, S&P 500 sets new record
articles.description: Bitcoin recovered from a midweek dip to $75,500 to climb back above $78,000 by Saturday morning in Asia, with the Senate's stablecoin yield compromise removing a key roadblock to crypto market structure legislation.

articles.title: Uber wants to turn its millions of drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
articles.description: Praveen Neppalli Naga, Uber's chief technology officer, revealed the plan in an interview at TechCrunch's StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, describing it as a natural extension of a nascent program the company announced in late January called AV Labs.

articles.title: New Bitcoin quantum proposal offers Satoshi Nakamoto a way to prove control without moving BTC
articles.description: A new design proposed by venture fund Paradigm would let holders privately timestamp proof that they control vulnerable keys before quantum computers arrive, creating a possible rescue path if Bitcoin ever sunsets old addresses.

articles.title: Bitcoin doesn’t need a fresh narrative to reclaim $100K: Analyst
articles.description: With attention spilling into multiple other technology sectors, crypto may struggle to capture a strong, price-driving narrative, a crypto analyst says.

articles.title: Bitcoin rally extends, yet BTC options price only 25% chance of $84K in May
articles.description: Institutional investors and corporate-level Bitcoin accumulation remain the primary drivers of BTC’s price gains, despite the lack of bullish leverage.
